creator: snvoronkov@yandex.ru
text:
A little addition to PR.

It seems, a bug exist in the source. Patched clamav-milter + clamd 
worked for me for about a hour. Until the wasn't much mails with HTML 
and attachments. Then load forced to > 100% (machine is 2 x Xeon 3.0 Hhz 
running 5.5). CPU time used on this hour was about 30m. Now on 0.88.7 it 
is less more then 20m (4 hours of uptime for the daemon).

The comparable problems are seen by another people running clamav-milter 
on relatively busy servers. For details see:

http://lurker.clamav.net/message/20070214.211252.14d867a4.en.html


Looks like we should wait for fixes. Or debug hard threaded programs 
like clamav-milter or clamd. Or drop port forever if no bugfix release 
will be avalible :-(.

Best Regards,

Serg.
